phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'imbarcadero del traghetto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH leem-bar-kah-DEH-roh del tra-GHET-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: Down at the lake, on the left.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si trova l'ufficio turistico, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see TROH-vah loof-fee-choh too-REE-stee-koh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: In the square, near the dock.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora parte il traghetto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah PAR-teh eel tra-GHET-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to Bellagio by ferry
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si arriva a Bellagio in traghetto?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see ar-REE-vah ah bel-LAH-joh een trah-GET-toh?
phrases.cultural_note: Bellagio sits at the meeting point of the three branches of Lake Como and is considered the most beautiful village on the lake.

responses.english: From Como pier, ferry every thirty minutes.
responses.phonetic: dal MOH-loh dee KOH-moh, trah-GET-toh ON-nyee TREN-tah mee-NOO-tee.
responses.local: Dal molo di Como, traghetto ogni trenta minuti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main gardens to visit are
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quali giardini si visitano a Bellagio?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAH-lee jar-DEE-nee see vee-zee-TAH-noh ah bel-LAH-joh?

responses.english: Villa Serbelloni and Villa Melzi, both open.
responses.phonetic: VEE-lah ser-bel-LOH-nee eh VEE-lah mel-TSEE, en-TRAM-bee ah-PER-tee.
responses.local: Villa Serbelloni e Villa Melzi, entrambi aperti.
